emails.subject: Re: New Power Demand Charge
emails.body: Re: New Power Demand Charge Is the $10,000/month scheduling fee part of the $1,193,725? Is the demand charge for all of the reimbursements on all pipelines combined? BF Chris Germany 12/13/2000 03:51 PM

emails.subject: Re: New Power Demand Charge
emails.body: The $10,000 scheduling fee is included and this demand charge is just for the New Power Market Area. We are still working on the East demand charges, they are not correct. I will probably add the East demand charges to a CGLF sales deal. Brenda H Fletcher 12/13/2000 04:01 PM
